fe_stage1.source: engineering-default: baffled Fe condenser presents multiple throat areas downstream of the constriction
fe_stage1.message: Condenser stage wall-deposit surface area follows the configured stage-area ratio; provisional geometry makes deposit/coating readouts status-bearing, not refused.

cr_stage2.source: engineering-default: removable Cr oxide cartridge sits between Fe condenser and SiO baffles with intermediate capture surface
cr_stage2.message: Condenser stage wall-deposit surface area follows the configured stage-area ratio; provisional geometry makes deposit/coating readouts status-bearing, not refused.

sio_stage3.source: engineering-default: removable SiO baffle cartridge needs the largest capture surface among named stages
sio_stage3.message: Condenser stage wall-deposit surface area follows the configured stage-area ratio; provisional geometry makes deposit/coating readouts status-bearing, not refused.

alkali_stage4.source: engineering-default: cyclone separator effective wall area exceeds throat but stays below SiO baffle cartridge
alkali_stage4.message: Condenser stage wall-deposit surface area follows the configured stage-area ratio; provisional geometry makes deposit/coating readouts status-bearing, not refused.

terminal.source: engineering-default: terminal vent/capture area is not the constriction; keep >= throat for follow-on Kn diagnostics
terminal.message: Condenser stage wall-deposit surface area follows the configured stage-area ratio; provisional geometry makes deposit/coating readouts status-bearing, not refused.

stage_area_geometry_provenance_notice.message: Condenser stage-area ratios include provisional/default geometry; wall-deposit and coating readouts are status-bearing until stage surface areas are certified.

parameter_metadata.name: pump_stage_isentropic_efficiency
parameter_metadata.ratification_note: RATIFICATION NOTE: owner ratifies the positive-displacement, perfectly intercooled stage premise and placeholder 0.70 efficiency before any optimizer wiring is authorized.

parameter_metadata.name: pump_motor_drive_efficiency
parameter_metadata.ratification_note: RATIFICATION NOTE: owner ratifies the representative 100 hp motor and full-load adjustable-speed-drive premise behind the rounded 0.95 * 0.95 = 0.90 combined efficiency before optimizer wiring.

parameter_metadata.name: max_stage_pressure_ratio
parameter_metadata.ratification_note: RATIFICATION NOTE: owner ratifies the 4:1 maximum stage pressure ratio when optimizer wiring is authorized.

industrial_mixed_glass.note: present only when operator declared early-tap via early_tap_mode=True; zero by default — mid-run cleaned_melt is NOT a product class

product_classification.markdown:
# Three-Product-Class Report
**Feedstock**: `lunar_mare_low_ti` • **Campaign**: `C0`

**Class totals**: Metals + O₂ potential: 7.712e-04 kg | Silica glass: — kg | Mixed glass: — kg | Rump: 999.999 kg

## 1. Metals + source-side O₂ potential (alkali / Fe / Mg / Si / Ti / Al / Ca / Cr / Mn / Ni / Co + emitted O₂ potential)

## 3. Industrial mixed glass (early-tap residual melt option)

shadow_trace.context: Path A: Continuous pN₂ ramp extracts Na/K/Fe/SiO₂. Path A_staged: staged pN₂ ramp separates alkali, SiO, hot Fe hold, then cool Na cleanup. Path B: pO₂-managed Fe-only pyrolysis preserving CMAS glass for tapping as Material 1.
